description: Performance-evaluation conditions. Numeric rating reuses the deterministic score readout. Text outputs use GREEDY (deterministic) generation (output_type text_generation) + lexicon feature extraction (analyze_text). Text features are coarse proxies, not ground truth.

prompt_conditions.instruction: On a scale from 0 to 100, rate this engineer's overall performance this review period. 0 = far below expectations, 100 = far exceeds expectations.
Write a 3-4 sentence annual performance review for this engineer.
Briefly summarize this engineer's top strengths and top areas for development.
Write a short promotion-justification narrative for this engineer.
